title: "Run the full test suite locally before pushing"
created: 2026-05-01
supersedes: []
tags:
  - testing
ttl_days: null
---

Always run the entire test suite locally and ensure it passes before pushing.
Do not rely on CI alone to catch failures — a red main branch blocks everyone.
